info.description: This is the API for The Fellowship!
info.title: The Fellowship API

get.summary: Lists the invite-only allowlist (with member status + role)

parameters.description: Email to invite and the role to grant
parameters.name: payload

parameters.name: payload

post.description: Signs user in and sets the access token session variable

parameters.description: Object containing the Google authorization code, calendar type, and the user's timezone offset
parameters.name: payload

delete.summary: Deletes a comment (own, or any when the caller is the event owner)

post.summary: Decline the current user's invite to the event
Duplicate event

parameters.description: Object containing options for the duplicated event
parameters.name: payload

get.description: Universal "add to calendar" — returns a text/calendar file for the gathering's locked-in time. No auth required so any invitee (incl. members without a Google account) can add it. 404 if the event has no confirmed gathering yet.
get.summary: Downloads an .ics calendar file for the event's confirmed gathering
Resolves an event identifier to both short and long IDs

post.summary: Rename a guest response

parameters.description: Object containing info about the guest response to rename
parameters.name: payload

post.summary: Mark the user as having responded to this event
Updates the current user's availability

parameters.description: Object containing info about the event response to update
parameters.name: payload

parameters.description: Object containing info about the event response to delete
parameters.name: payload

parameters.description: Lower bound for start time to filter availability by
parameters.name: timeMin

parameters.description: Upper bound for end time to filter availability by
parameters.name: timeMax

post.description: Records the caller's attendance for the event's confirmed gathering. Requires the event to have a locked-in time (scheduledEvent). Open to signed-in users and guests (by name), like availability responses.
post.summary: RSVP to a confirmed gathering (going / maybe / no)

delete.summary: Remove the caller's RSVP to a gathering

post.description: Persists the chosen gathering time on the event's scheduledEvent and, when reminderEnabled, arms a one-time pre-gathering reminder email sent reminderLeadTimeHours before the start. Pass scheduled=false to cancel.
post.summary: Confirms (or cancels) a gathering's locked-in time and reminder
Gets the number of signed up users

delete.summary: Deletes the currently signed in user

parameters.description: Lower bound for event's start time to filter by
parameters.name: timeMin

parameters.description: Upper bound for event's end time to filter by
parameters.name: timeMax

parameters.description: Comma separated list of accounts to fetch calendar events from
parameters.name: accounts

post.description:
Sends a 6-digit code to the new email. The change is only applied
after it is confirmed via /user/email/verify-change. Keeps the
invite-only allowlist in sync (the new address is confirmed before
it is allowlisted).
post.summary: Requests an email change by sending a verification code to the new address
Confirms an email change with the code sent to the new address

parameters.description: New email and the code sent to it
parameters.name: payload

get.description: Returns an array containing all the user's events

post.summary: Sets the folder for the specified event

parameters.description: The ID of the event to set the folder for
parameters.name: eventId

parameters.description: The ID of the folder to set the event to
parameters.name: payload

200.description: A list of all folders for the user

post.summary: Create a new folder

201.description: The ID of the created folder

400.description: Invalid user ID or request body

400.description: Invalid user ID or folder ID

400.description: Invalid user ID or folder ID

400.description: Invalid user ID or folder ID

parameters.description: Object containing the email + type of the calendar account to remove
parameters.name: payload

get.summary: Searches the user's contacts based on the given query

parameters.description: Email of calendar account and whether to enable it
parameters.name: payload

parameters.description: Email of calendar account, the sub calendar id, and whether to enable it
parameters.name: payload

get.summary: Returns a minimal public user profile (safe for unauthenticated clients)
Returns whether the given user is a premium user

email.description: Email is required for all calendar accounts

allDay.description: Whether the event is an all day event

free.description: Whether the user is free during this event

authorName.description: Denormalized author display name (guest name, or the account's "First Last").

userId.description:
UserId is the guest's name OR a signed-in user's id hex — it authorizes
edit / delete-own. IsGuest disambiguates the two.

attendees.description: Attendees for an availability group (fetched from Attendees collection)

comments.description: Discussion thread (fetched from the comments collection; not stored here)

daysOnly.description: Whether to only poll for days, not times

gatheringReminder.description: Pre-gathering reminder email config/state (paired with ScheduledEvent)

hasResponded.description: Whether the user has responded to the availability group (fetched based on whether user is in Attendees)

hasSpecificTimes.description: Used for specific times for specific dates feature

location.description:
Free-text venue/address for the gathering (C12). Surfaced on the event
page, in the .ics LOCATION, and in the reminder email.

numResponses.description: Used to store the number of responses for the event

responses.description: Availability responses - old format for backward compatibility (fetched from eventResponses collection)

rsvps.description: RSVPs to the confirmed gathering, keyed by guest name / signed-in user id

scheduledEvent.description: Scheduled event (the confirmed gathering time, once the owner locks it in)

startOnMonday.description: Whether to start the event on Monday (as opposed to Sunday, used for DOW events)

timezone.description: IANA tz for formatting the email time (e.g. "America/Los_Angeles")

enabledCalendars.description: Maps email to an array of sub calendar ids

manualAvailability.description: Mapping from the start date of a day to the available times for that day

useCalendarAvailability.description: Calendar availability variables for Availability Groups feature

guestCount.description:
GuestCount is the number of ADDITIONAL people this responder is bringing
(a spouse/plus-one), i.e. the headcount for this RSVP is 1 + GuestCount.
Only meaningful for going/maybe.

signUpBlockIds.description: The IDs of the sign up blocks the user is CONFIRMED for (within capacity)

waitlistBlockIds.description:
The IDs of the sign up blocks the user is WAITLISTED for (block was full).
Assigned server-side by capacity; see assignSignUpBlocks (C9).

calendarAccounts.description:
CalendarAccounts is a mapping from {`email_CALENDARTYPE` => CalendarAccount} that contains all the
additional accounts the user wants to see google calendar events for

hasCustomName.description: Whether the user has set a custom name for themselves, i.e. don't change their name when they sign in

primaryAccountKey.description: The calendarAccountKey of the account the user first signed in with

role.description:
Role is the user's access level in the invite-only Fellowship
(superAdmin/admin/member/guest). Empty ⇒ treated as member. See roles.go.
